We will Tell You the Truth Upfront


If your case does not meet the criteria for a recovery, we’ll tell you up-front.
And if there is a more appropriate or affordable solution available, we’ll tell you what it is beforehand.

Multi Security

Add multi-security feature to your wallet to be in a safer side! so that even when your phrase has been leaked mistakenly, no one can have access to your account or make transactions.

Join VIP

Join the “VERY IMPORTANT PERSONALITY “ in your wallet community
This is a wide branch of a recognized users … there are always some bonus percentage gifted to the VIP users than others in each transaction they make , click here to become a VIP user.

Be A Certified Member

Become a certified and specially recognized member of your wallet
This feature allows you to get some certain privileges from your wallet.

Recover Missing Funds

Recover any of your missing crypto assets, it dosen’t matter the amount or when you lost it…. We assure you 100% that You can Recover them here.

Transaction Delay

If you experience a delay in a transaction or you suspects a fake transaction was made to you which is taking longer time than expected, you can verify it here and see where the problem comes from.

Coin Check

Check if the coins in your wallet are real or fake
If you made a transaction with an untrusted dealer or trader and you suspects they might have sent you a fake coin, check the coin here and verify.

My Assets Security is an expert in forensic cryptocurrency investigations and complex card-not-present transaction disputes, and has recovered millions of dollars for consumers worldwide.

Our technology and expertise aid law enforcement agencies, cryptocurrency exchanges and banks by expediting their own investigations and reducing processing time.

Let us know any other issues you are facing on the cyber for a better solution.

Contact Us Via [email protected]

Crypto Investigation Report

We will summarize our extensive crypto investigation results in a report that will give you a head start with bitcoin recovery. Our investigation reports are crucial to getting authorities interested in your case and will give them the leads they need to help you get your money back.
